title: n8n crashing due to low memory
symptom: n8n is crashing and restarting in a loop, displaying 'Last session crashed' messages. Logs may not capture the error due to rapid restarts.
applies_when: Running n8n on a low-memory server (e.g., 512MB RAM)
root_cause: n8n requires a certain amount of memory to operate effectively, especially with background processes like the task broker. On low-memory servers, it can run out of resources, leading to crashes and restarts.
fix_steps: Upgrade your server to at least 1GB RAM for better stability.
If upgrading is not possible, add swap memory to your server.
Consider disabling unused features in n8n to reduce memory usage.
agent_instruction: Upgrade your server to at least 1GB RAM or add swap memory to stabilize n8n.
